canonical_definition: Dataset of 675 images with 14,175 concept–explanation pairs from humans and VLMs, used to benchmark abstract concept attribution and explanation in visual contexts.
papers: Uncovering Argumentative Flow: A Question-Focus Discourse Structuring Framework

relationships.evidence: To address these RQs, we present AbsVis, the first large-scale dataset of abstract concept attributions in images by humans and VLMs. (Section 1).

emnlp25: Uncovering Argumentative Flow: A Question-Focus Discourse Structuring Framework

relationships.evidence: Paper title: AbsVis – Benchmarking How Humans and Vision-Language Models "See" Abstract Concepts in Images
